creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andreas Schwarz from comment #20)
> The problem with the vesa driver is still there. I can switch to the scfb
> driver and it will work without any
> problems. I'm not using drm driver or have drm kernel modules loaded.
> 
> Xorg.0.log
> 
>   https://pastebin.com/XW3DvzVe
> 
> abc@tapir:~ $ uname -a 
> FreeBSD tapir 12.0-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p8 GENERIC  amd64

Can you check if a driver is attached to the graphics card?
xf86-video-vesa looks to see if a driver is attached to the graphics card, and don't want to work then.
Are you using efi or bios boot?
